props.message:
Wyrdmark Records.

A small alcove of the Cache. Older pages live here. The Hollow lies through the inner door.

A short genealogy, freshly copied:

"...Wyrdking the Eighth, son of the Seventh, who shaped his own bones; the Last Wyrd, of whom no name remains."
An old map of the Hollow, most of it faded. Only the entry chamber and a single inner room are still legible. The rest is a brown haze the ink could not hold.

A pinned warning, lettered carefully:

"Do not enter the Hollow without a Sigil-bearer's blessing. Do not enter alone. Do not enter without first reading what is here. — Recorder Thav"

props.open_message: A glass vessel with a small bright thing inside. Recorder Thav left a note: "For what is coming."

root.speaker: Recorder Thav
root.text: Welcome, walker. This alcove keeps the Wyrdmark's own records — small, but very old. The Hollow lies through that door.

wyrdking.speaker: Recorder Thav
wyrdking.text: The Wyrdking Bonelord. The last shaping Khorgaul put on the Wyrd's bones. He guards the inner door. He does not, in the deepest part of him, want to.

wyrd.speaker: Recorder Thav
wyrd.text: An ancient creature. Old before the Wyrdkin walked. The Hollow is named for it because it hollowed the place out, slowly, by lying still in it for a long time. That is all the records say with certainty.

hint.speaker: Recorder Thav
hint.text: A line from a faded page: "Three triggers, three Sigils, all must answer the door." I do not know what it means in full. But I would mark it down, walker. The Hollow loves a thing said three times.

bye.speaker: Recorder Thav
bye.text: Walk well. And go in with a Sigil-bearer's blessing, or do not go in at all.
